steps.prompt: This is an OR gate. I wonder — will the top switch be enough to make the fan spin?
steps.feedback: The fan spins! OR only needs one switch. Turn the top switch off — does the bottom work too?
Fan stops. Now try the bottom switch.
The bottom switch works too! Now try turning the top switch on at the same time!
Fan still spins! OR works with one or both switches on. That's the difference — both is fine with OR!
